sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91757" key="puri/foitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρί-φοιτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91757.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walking in fire</tr_>, epith. of Persephone, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Mag.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
